highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: There is a possible short on the failure of 6954….
They firstly wait for a vertical, elevator down sell.
I wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “Below there one very obvious trade is a Failed Breakdown of the December 17th 6773 low.
For the 6954 short one wants to see a final bounce there, then one can short perhaps 6950.” This morning we broke the range down and got an elevator down sell into 6870ish.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
Typically, it becomes a magnet which then needs to be back-tested.
Since then ES had been tightly rangebound mostly 6954-6997 with 6970 being a magnet in the middle and the break of this range would determine the next notable move.

post_title: After A Week Of Upside, SPX Finally Dips. Will CPI Tomorrow Bring It Back Up? Feb 13th Plan
